description_long: This electric drill features a robust cylindrical body with a matte black finish, accented by a tan band around its midsection. Two ergonomic handles extend from either side, designed for a secure grip and precise control during operation. The front end is equipped with a large, round chuck, but no drill bit is currently attached. A visible trigger button is integrated into one of the handles, and a small metallic component sits atop the main body, possibly for accessory attachment or adjustment. The drill's surface is mostly hard plastic and metal, with some visible ventilation slots for cooling. Its design suggests durability and functionality for heavy-duty urban or workshop tasks.
description: A sturdy, black and tan electric drill with dual ergonomic handles, a large front chuck, and visible trigger and ventilation slots. The design is robust and suitable for demanding tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan band, both handles, and the main body details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular chuck opening and symmetrical handle placement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 but with more detail on the rear section.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the drill and the alignment of the handles.
